news.html: Lead-author flood-mapping manuscript submitted to Remote Sensing of Environment (arXiv preprint) — land cover & flood type govern detection limits. preprint
New paper in Remote Sensing of Environment — sUAS–Sentinel-2 cross-scale biomass mapping. DOI
Co-author on Prithvi-EO-2.0 foundation-model paper in IEEE TGRS. DOI
WxC-Bench weather & climate benchmark dataset out in Scientific Data. DOI
Presented Operationalizing Prithvi-EO-2.0 (oral) at the AGU Fall Meeting 2025.
Awarded the AGU Open Science Recognition Prize (Prithvi Geospatial AI Foundation Model Team).
Named to the University of South Dakota 30 Under 30 class of 2025.
Received the Distinguished Dissertation Award (Biological/Life Sciences) at the University of South Dakota.
